<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: for repo in $(find /Users/fabricebeya/mandla-wallet-core-service -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | sort); do
  dir=$(dirname "$repo")
  name=$(basename "$dir")
  if [ -f "$dir/.gitignore" ]; then
    if grep -qE '^secrets/?$|^secrets/$' "$dir/.gitignore" 2>/dev/null; then
      echo "HAS secrets/: $name"
    else
      echo "NEEDS secrets/: $name"
    fi
  else
    echo "NO .gitignore: $name"
  fi
done</summary>

```bash
for repo in $(find /Users/fabricebeya/mandla-wallet-core-service -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | sort); do
  dir=$(dirname "$repo")
  name=$(basename "$dir")
  if [ -f "$dir/.gitignore" ]; then
    if grep -qE '^secrets/?$|^secrets/$' "$dir/.gitignore" 2>/dev/null; then
      echo "HAS secrets/: $name"
    else
      echo "NEEDS secrets/: $name"
    fi
  else
    echo "NO .gitignore: $name"
  fi
done
```

  dir=$(dirname "$repo")

```bash
for repo in $(find /Users/fabricebeya/mandla-wallet-core-service -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null); do
  dir=$(dirname "$repo")
  tracked=$(git -C "$dir" ls-files secrets/ 2>/dev/null | head -5)
  if [ -n "$tracked" ]; then
    echo "TRACKED in $(basename "$dir"):"
    git -C "$dir" ls-files secrets/ 2>/dev/null
  fi
done
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I'll batch update all .gitignore files across the repositories.

Spring Boot and Maven services will get secrets/ added after their "Local-only config" sections. Node services will get it added after .env lines. I'll create .gitignore files for mandla-mandla-docs, mandla-money-scripts, and zitadel. The root .gitignore will include secrets/. Non-git folders like mandla-control-centre and mandla-secrets-manager will also be covered. Nested git repos inside whatsapp-emulator will each get their own .gitignore.

I'll use a shell script or search_replace to batch-update all 25 target .gitignore files. Spring Boot configs will get `secrets/` after `application-local.yml` lines. Node configs will get it appended at the end. Repositories needing updates include mandla-activity-monitoring-service, mandla-app-service, and mandla-business-web-app.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2.5)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
A shell script will add secrets/ to all .gitignore files that lack it.

Git-cached secrets/ folders will be untracked across repositories. The script appends a comment block and `secrets/` to each `.gitignore`, skipping duplicates.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2.5)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: cd /Users/fabricebeya/mandla-wallet-core-service

# All .gitignore files in the workspace (including non-git folders)
GITIGNORES=$(find . -name ".gitignore" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.next/*" 2>/dev/null | sort)

for gi in $GITIGNORES; do
  if grep -qE '^secrets/?$|^secrets/$' "$gi" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "SKIP (already has secrets/): $gi"
  else
    printf '\n# Local secrets (Zitadel keys, etc.) — never commit\nsecrets/\n' >> "$gi"
    echo "UPDATED: $gi"
  fi
done

# Create .gitignore for git repos that don't have one
for gitdir in $(find . -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | sort); do
  repo=$(dirname "$gitdir")
  if [ ! -f "$repo/.gitignore" ]; then
    printf '# Local secrets (Zitadel keys, etc.) — never commit\nsecrets/\n' > "$repo/.gitignore"
    echo "CREATED: $repo/.gitignore"
  fi
done
</summary>

```bash
cd /Users/fabricebeya/mandla-wallet-core-service

# All .gitignore files in the workspace (including non-git folders)
GITIGNORES=$(find . -name ".gitignore" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.next/*" 2>/dev/null | sort)

for gi in $GITIGNORES; do
  if grep -qE '^secrets/?$|^secrets/$' "$gi" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "SKIP (already has secrets/): $gi"
  else
    printf '\n# Local secrets (Zitadel keys, etc.) — never commit\nsecrets/\n' >> "$gi"
    echo "UPDATED: $gi"
  fi
done

# Create .gitignore for git repos that don't have one
for gitdir in $(find . -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | sort); do
  repo=$(dirname "$gitdir")
  if [ ! -f "$repo/.gitignore" ]; then
    printf '# Local secrets (Zitadel keys, etc.) — never commit\nsecrets/\n' > "$repo/.gitignore"
    echo "CREATED: $repo/.gitignore"
  fi
done

```

```bash
cd /Users/fabricebeya/mandla-wallet-core-service

for gitdir in $(find . -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | sort); do
  repo=$(dirname "$gitdir")
  tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files secrets/ 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$tracked" ]; then
    echo "Untracking secrets in $repo..."
    git -C "$repo" rm -r --cached secrets/ 2>/dev/null
  fi
done
```

echo "=== Missing secrets/ in .gitignore ==="
find . -name ".gitignore" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null | sort | while read -r gi; do
  grep -qE '^secrets/?$|^secrets/$' "$gi" || echo "MISSING: $gi"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Still tracked secrets ==="
for gitdir in $(find . -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null); do
  repo=$(dirname "$gitdir")
  tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files secrets/ 2>/dev/null)
  [ -n "$tracked" ] && echo "$repo: $tracked"

```bash
cd /Users/fabricebeya/mandla-wallet-core-service

echo "=== Missing secrets/ in .gitignore ==="
find . -name ".gitignore" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null | sort | while read -r gi; do
  grep -qE '^secrets/?$|^secrets/$' "$gi" || echo "MISSING: $gi"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Still tracked secrets ==="
for gitdir in $(find . -maxdepth 3 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null); do
  repo=$(dirname "$gitdir")
  tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files secrets/ 2>/dev/null)
  [ -n "$tracked" ] && echo "$repo: $tracked"
done

echo ""
echo "=== Local secrets still on disk (sample) ==="
ls mandla-app-service/secrets/ 2>/dev/null | head -3
```

```
=== Still tracked secrets ===

=== Local secrets still on disk (sample) ===
zitadel-introspection-key.json
zitadel-m2m-key.json
zitadel-partner-introspection-key.json

```
